name: Jamf: Account Access by Name
description: Filter to view access of a Jamf Account named or starting with 'LC' - increase the maximum edges to see more relationships (i.e. change 5 to 6 to see 1 more)
query:
MATCH p=(s:jamf_Account)-[*1..5]->(t)
WHERE s.name STARTS WITH 'LC'
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
